use_cases: Displaying data visualizations with configurable chart themes
Responsive chart rendering within React applications
Providing reusable chart container infrastructure for dashboards
Supporting light and dark mode chart styling
ai_summary: A reusable chart container component from the meschacirung design system that wraps Recharts with theme configuration support. Provides a responsive, accessible chart wrapper with customizable styling for light and dark modes, featuring built-in CSS selectors for consistent chart element theming.
